query:
SELECT 
  sl.name AS outlet,
  o.orderType,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count,
  ROUND(SUM(o.subtotal) / 100, 2) AS subtotal,
  ROUND(SUM(o.stateGst + o.centralGst) / 100, 2) AS gst,
  ROUND(SUM(o.totalAmount) / 100, 2) AS gross_revenue
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN store_locations sl ON o.outletId = sl.id
WHERE o.createdAt >= '2026-05-10 00:00:00' 
  AND o.createdAt < '2026-05-11 00:00:00'
  AND o.orderStatus != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY sl.name, o.orderType
ORDER BY sl.name, o.orderType;
